message: Autoresearch goal created: Profit moonshot return-quality alpha discovery: find stable train/validation-selected candidate with >=2% monthlyized train/val/OOS returns, OOS MDD <=25%, high Sharpe/Sortino/smart Sortino/Calmar, locked-OOS report/gate-only, <8GiB memory
